mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL levels directly compress real equity valuations by eroding corporate profit margins and consumer purchasing power, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 over 3-year rolling windows or positive forward returns occur in >65% of high-inflation months.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in UNRATE exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals labor market deterioration that reduces aggregate consumption expectations, driving negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered months or the signal loses statistical significance (p>0.05) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in RSAFS and HOUST indicate a synchronized contraction in consumer credit and housing demand, which reduces corporate revenue forecasts and produces negative market returns.
failure_condition: Joint decline periods yield positive forward returns in >55% of cases or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Declining INDPRO levels during a monetary tightening cycle reflect supply-side bottlenecks that force central banks to maintain restrictive policy, resulting in negative equity valuations.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses to positive during tightening periods or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 24-month windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in PAYEMS reflects robust employment expansion that supports household income and corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive forward returns occur in <50% of high-growth employment months or the correlation coefficient drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Rising FEDFUNDS combined with falling GDPC1 indicates policy-induced demand destruction that compresses equity multiples and drives negative market performance.
failure_condition: The interaction effect produces positive returns in >60% of observed quarters or fails to improve model fit over additive specifications.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month drop in INDPRO exceeding 0.5 points signals acute industrial contraction that triggers recession fears and forces immediate equity deleveraging.
failure_condition: Market returns remain positive in >58% of sharp industrial decline events or the signal shows no predictive power in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Rising RSAFS levels during periods of low UNRATE indicate strong consumer borrowing capacity that fuels retail sales growth and supports positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns fail to materialize in >50% of triggered months or the conditional effect vanishes when unemployment exceeds 4.0%.
